speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning , sir . May I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Good morning , I have an appointment with Mr . Johnson at 10:00

speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , sir , but are you Mr . Richard of World Trading Company ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I ’ m sorry , Mr . Richard . Mr . Johnson is on his way to the office . He had just called and asked you to wait a minute .

speaker: speaker1
text: Would you like something to drink , sir ? Do you prefer coffee or tea ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Here you are , Mr . Richard . This is the cream and this is the sugar . If there ’ s anything else you ’ d like , please don ’ t hesitate to tell me .
